extra.reason: Imported new-project-triage into skills/, fixed deploy replacement for existing global directories, validated, and deployed globally.
Implemented --quality-rank for youtube-search, documented it, bumped version, and QA passed validate plus live search/evaluate acceptance checks.
Merged multi-database scientific-paper-searcher results now sort by citation count after dedup while single-database order is preserved; validate and live jq acceptance checks passed.
Added --describe schemas to youtube-search search, deep-dive, and evaluate; QA passed schema acceptance checks, py_compile, validate-skill, and diff check.
Added early --describe JSON schemas to all six scientific-paper-searcher public scripts; QA passed bash syntax, all jq schema checks, validate-skill, and diff check.
Added --fields to youtube-search search and deep-dive with schema/docs updates; QA passed live field-filter checks, validate-skill, py_compile, and diff check.
Added --channel-url prefix validation to youtube-search search; QA passed invalid/valid URL behavior, validate-skill, py_compile, and diff check.
Added --fields to scientific-paper-searcher search scripts and orchestrator with describe updates; QA passed S2/orchestrator field projection checks, bash syntax, validate-skill, and diff check.

Added --offset to scientific-paper-searcher search scripts and orchestrator with source offsets and describe updates; QA passed all offset acceptance checks, default offset checks, validate-skill, bash syntax, and diff check.
